phases.name: Crypto Primitives
phases.description: AES-GCM/X25519 file encryption and Ed25519 version-policy signing — foundational cryptographic operations consumed by every higher phase.

phases.name: RPC Infrastructure
phases.description: Connection-pooled JSON-RPC client and chain-RPC proxy used by every blockchain-facing operation.

phases.name: Wallet
phases.description: secp256k1-based wallet operations — keypair management, transaction signing (EIP-155), balance queries, and email-backup envelope.

phases.name: Geth Lifecycle and Mining
phases.description: Manages the embedded Core-Geth process, CPU and GPU mining controls, and the JSON-RPC port routing between local and remote endpoints.

phases.name: Pricing and Cost Tiers
phases.description: Computes the per-MB download price, platform-fee split, and seller/burn distribution for paid transfers.

phases.name: Persistent Storage
phases.description: On-disk persistence for Drive items, hosting sites, and reputation events. Pure data layer — no network, no signing.

phases.name: Network and File Transfer
phases.description: libp2p NetworkBehaviour scaffolding and the chunked file-transfer protocol (256 KB chunks, per-chunk SHA-256, full-file hash verification).

phases.name: DHT Service
phases.description: Kademlia DHT, peer management, file/seeder publishing and discovery, signed file metadata, identify-based version enforcement.

phases.name: HTTP Gateway and APIs
phases.description: Axum HTTP gateway: Drive CRUD, reputation, relay share proxy, hosting/CDN endpoints, version-policy endpoint, version-based middleware.

phases.name: Tauri Command Surface
phases.description: Top-level Tauri command wrappers, AppState, startup orchestration, all user-invokable commands. Aggregates every other phase.

phases.name: Binaries
phases.description: Process entry points: desktop app, CLI, headless daemon, relay server, policy-sign operator CLI.
